info.title: VOS OMS Public API
info.description: Public REST API surface for Vero OMS. Authentication requests use platform.verolabs.co. REST API requests use api-oms.verolabs.co.

tags.name: Trading
tags.description: Order entry, quote, IOI, and trading activity APIs.

tags.name: Portfolio & Risk
tags.description: Accounts, holdings, mappings, and risk-rule read APIs.

tags.name: Administration
tags.description: Permissions, groups, workflow, reference data, and audit APIs.

post.description: Authenticates an email identifier and password, then returns a session token and Bearer JWT for API calls.
Sends a one-time recovery code to the account email address and creates a short-lived recovery session. Preserve the response cookie for the verify and reset requests.

Set-Cookie.description: Short-lived recovery session cookie required by the next recovery request.

post.description: Verifies the one-time code for the active recovery session. Send the recovery session cookie returned by the start request.

Set-Cookie.description: Updated recovery session cookie required by the reset-password request.

post.description: Sets the new account password after code verification. Send the recovery session cookie returned by the verify request. A successful response also returns an authenticated session.

get.description: Returns liveness status for the REST API.

Returns count, min, max, avg, p50, p95, p99, and a time-bucketed series.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `admin`.

Most-recent latency records with paging.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `admin`.

Returns matching latency detail records and derived per-segment latencies. When `request_id` is supplied without time parameters, the query uses the request identifier. Otherwise, the query uses the time window.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `admin`.

Returns order records scoped to the accounts the caller can access. A caller with no account grants receives an empty page. `from_ns` and `to_ns` filter by order creation timestamp (`create_unix_utc_time_ms`).

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

parameters.name: original_req_id
parameters.description: Filter by the order stable entry key. Trade records use the same value in `original_req_id`, which can be used to match orders and trades.

parameters.name: orig_cl_ord_id
parameters.description: Filter by the originating client order id.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description:
Optional refinement. Must be one of the caller's permitted accounts — a request for an
account the caller has no grant on is rejected with 403.

get.description: Returns IOI advertisement board data. Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

get.summary: List the calling user's own per-account permission grants
get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.
Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

post.description:
Grants account permission for the specified user and account.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

delete.description:
Revokes account permission for the specified user and account.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

post.description:
Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

get.summary: List the members (accounts) of a group
get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

delete.summary: Remove an account from its group
delete.description:
Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

post.summary: Move an account into a group (single membership)
post.description:
Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

get.summary: Caller-scoped account search (backs the terminal CMD search)
get.description:
Returns only the accounts the calling user is permitted on whose code matches `q` (case-insensitive substring).

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Optional case-insensitive substring to match account codes.

post.description:
Creates a `PENDING` request. The body's `type` selects the request kind, one of:
`CREATE_RISK_RULE`, `DELETE_RISK_RULE`, `GRANT_PERMISSION`, `REVOKE_PERMISSION`,
`CREATE_GROUP`, `MOVE_ACCOUNT`, `CREATE_ACCOUNT`, `UPDATE_ACCOUNT`, `DEPOSIT`, `WITHDRAW`,
`ADD_STOCK`, `REMOVE_STOCK`. The remaining fields are the type-specific payload.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.
Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

post.summary: Approve a request (reviewer must differ from requester)
post.description:
Approves a pending request and records the workflow result.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `checker` or `admin`.

post.summary: Reject a request (reviewer must differ from requester)
post.description:
Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `checker` or `admin`.

post.summary: Cancel a request (only the original requester may cancel)
post.description:
Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

get.description:
Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `checker` or `admin`.

Requires `kind=comp_id` or `kind=sender_sub_id`.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Reference data kind. Supported values are `comp_id` and `sender_sub_id`.

post.description:
Adds or upserts a reference list value.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

delete.description:
Deletes one reference list value.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

get.description:
Optionally filter by `firm_id`.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

post.description:
Adds or upserts one firm to trader ID mapping.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

delete.description:
Deletes one firm to trader ID mapping.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Required JWT role: `maker` or `admin`.

get.description: Returns order API health status.

Returns live order-risk reject rules.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

get.description: Returns health status for Vero OMS.

Returns configured account mappings, filtered by permissions when permission filtering is active.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Returns one account mapping by account code.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Returns current cash balances and stock holdings for every permitted account.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Returns one account balance and holdings by engine account id.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

Returns active risk rules from the live read model.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>` from `POST /api/auth/login`.

AccountID.name: account_id
AccountID.description: Optional account identifier filter. When used as a path parameter, identifies one account.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Page size. Defaults to 200; capped by the per-API max limit.

Offset.name: offset
Offset.description: Zero-based number of records to skip.

FromNs.name: from_ns
FromNs.description: Start of the time window as epoch nanoseconds.

ToNs.name: to_ns
ToNs.description: End of the time window as epoch nanoseconds.

AuthLoginRequest.description: Password login request. Set identifier to the account email address.

AuthRecoveryStartRequest.description: Request to send a one-time password-recovery code.

status.description: Indicates that the recovery code request was accepted.

code.description: One-time recovery code delivered to the account email address.

AuthRecoveryVerifyRequest.description: Request to verify a one-time password-recovery code.

status.description: Indicates that the recovery code was verified.

password.description: New password for the Vero OMS account.

AuthRecoveryResetRequest.description: Request to set a new password after recovery-code verification.

tokenized.description: Bearer JWT issued for REST API calls.

AuthSession.description: Session object. The `tokenized` field is the Bearer JWT used for API calls.

sessionToken.description: Session token returned after authentication. Store it securely for session refresh and logout.

jwt.description: Bearer JWT returned for REST API calls.

AdminJSON.description:
JSON response. The exact shape depends on the route (a list, a single record, or a
lifecycle acknowledgement). Errors use the standard error envelope.
